# SCShareableContentStyle.none

**Case**

The stream isn’t currently presenting any content.

## Declaration

```swift
case none
```

## Content styles

- **SCShareableContentStyle.application**: The stream is currently presenting one or more applications.
- **SCShareableContentStyle.display**: The stream is currently presenting a complete display.
- **SCShareableContentStyle.window**: The stream is currently presenting one or more windows.

items.description: The stream is currently presenting one or more applications.
items.name: SCShareableContentStyle.application

items.description: The stream is currently presenting a complete display.

items.description: The stream is currently presenting one or more windows.
